title: Portfolio Website with AI Assistant
description: A modern personal portfolio website featuring an AI assistant capable of answering questions about my resume, projects, skills, education, and achievements using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
longDescription: Designed and developed a professional portfolio website using React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend. The portfolio integrates a custom Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline powered by Gemini API, allowing visitors to ask questions about my experience, projects, skills, education, and competitive programming. The assistant retrieves relevant information from a knowledge base before generating accurate responses.
challenges: Building a generic knowledge indexing pipeline

title: Scalable URL Shortener
description: A scalable URL shortening service featuring Redis caching, analytics, BullMQ workers, and MongoDB for persistent storage.
longDescription: Built a production-ready URL shortening service capable of generating unique short URLs, efficiently redirecting users, caching frequently accessed URLs with Redis, and processing click analytics asynchronously using BullMQ workers.

title: Multiplayer Chess
description: A real-time multiplayer room-based chess application with matchmaking, authentication, Socket.IO communication, and synchronized gameplay.
longDescription: Developed a multiplayer chess platform supporting real-time gameplay using Socket.IO. Features include authentication, matchmaking, synchronized game state, persistent sessions, and responsive user experience.

title: Spam Mail Classifier
description: Built an NLP-based spam classifier using TF-IDF vectorization and scikit-learn with 92.46% precision.
longDescription: Developed a machine learning application for spam email classification using Natural Language Processing techniques including text preprocessing, TF-IDF vectorization, and Naive Bayes classification.

title: Event Portal
description: A full-stack event management platform supporting event creation, registrations, eligibility filtering, and role-based access control.
longDescription: Built a comprehensive event management platform allowing organizers to create events and students to register based on eligibility criteria. Includes authentication, role-based authorization, and responsive dashboards.

title: Placement Portal
description: A complete placement management platform with recruiter and student dashboards, eligibility filtering, analytics, and resume management.
longDescription: Designed and developed a complete campus placement platform supporting recruiters, students, and administrators. Features include eligibility filtering, authentication, resume management, analytics, and placement workflow automation.

title: Rock Paper Scissors
description: A browser-based Rock Paper Scissors game built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
longDescription: A simple web-based game implementing the classic Rock Paper Scissors logic with an interactive user interface, score tracking, and responsive design.
